_comment: Submission payload for the A2A Protocol Agent Registry (a2aregistry.org). Submit AFTER deploy so the agent-card URL resolves. The registry fetches /.well-known/agent-card.json from `agentCardUrl` for the live capability list.
name: Negotiation Copilot for Agents (SNHP)
description: Get the math-optimal next move in a price negotiation, in plain dollars. Call POST /v1/negotiate/turn with your side, walk-away $, target $, and the other side's offers; it returns the dollar counter to send, a ready-to-send message, and when to accept or walk. Negotiates ~12% better head-to-head (validated, n=20 paired LLM negotiations, p<0.0001), works against any counterparty with zero setup, no LLM needed. For multi-issue deals (job offer, vendor contract) use /v1/negotiate/bundle, which logrolls across linked issues. Advanced: when both agents run SNHP, verified peering unlocks a cooperation premium and signed AP2 settlement.
auth: none for negotiation; operator registration only for advanced verified peering
